_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Skill in conducting operational process improvement for data workflows, identifying inefficiencies, designing automation opportunities, and measuring improvement outcomes.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI OP domain. OP-S-008 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-A-002 (OP, cosine: 0.567), DQ-K-013 (DQ, cosine: 0.532).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.0/10 (raw 0.596). Shared vocabulary: [operational]. DCWF-only terms [knowledge, planning, processes] vs WIDAI-only terms [automation, conducting, data, designing, identifying, improvement] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.893 (P=0.918, R=0.869). P exceeds R by 0.049 — the DCWF element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 18 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.5%). "Knowledge of operational planning processes." and "Skill in conducting operational process improvement for data workflows, identify" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.579 ≈ STS 0.596 (gap 0.018). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [operational] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 4.8%. Shared tokens: [operational]. DCWF-only: [knowledge, planning, processes]. WIDAI-only: [automation, conducting, data, designing, identifying, improvement].
